About

The DJ Behind the Decks

DJ Eazzy 254 — born Erastus Maina — is a Nairobi-based DJ with over 10 years of professional experience across mobile, resident, and corporate scenes. Holding a BSc in Events & Convention Management from the Technical University of Kenya, he blends musical mastery with event expertise.

As CEO of Procode Entertainment, he leads a dedicated team delivering top-tier DJ services, sound, and PA for events across Kenya and beyond.

What We Offer

Services

🎙
Corporate Events

Product launches, award ceremonies, team-building events, and summits. Delivering polished, professional entertainment that elevates your brand.

🎉
Private Events

Weddings, graduation parties, birthday bashes, and exclusive gatherings — tailor-made playlists and seamless execution every time.

🔊
Sound & PA Systems

Full sound system setup, PA hire, microphones, amplifiers, and mixers. We handle the technical so your event sounds flawless.

🏟
Festivals & Shows

Experience headlining festivals like Nairobi Beer Festival, Tusker Oktoba Fest, and Concours D'Elegance afterparties.

🎵
Resident DJ Sets

Regular club and lounge residencies, keeping the dance floor alive night after night with genre-blending expertise.

📱
Social Media DJ

Live-stream DJ sets, online event coverage, and social media engagement — bringing the vibe to audiences everywhere.
